sentences.translation: Gospođa Fatima je otišla posjetiti komšinicu.
sentences.translationEn: Mrs. Fatima went to visit her neighbor.

sentences.translation: Ponijela je sa sobom slatkiše i voće.
sentences.translationEn: She brought sweets and fruit with her.

sentences.translation: Sjele su i razgovarale o djeci.
sentences.translationEn: They sat and talked about the children.

sentences.arabic: الجِيرَانُ مِثْلُ الأُسْرَةِ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Komšije su kao porodica u arapskoj kulturi.
sentences.translationEn: Neighbors are like family in Arab culture.
